changelog:
What's new in v2.4.6:
- Default "Grex-Spce" workspace auto-created & bound to all assistants
- Workspace tools work WITHOUT Rootfs (Rootfs now optional)
- Fixed crash on minimize/slow network (MessageNode empty)
- DuckDuckGo search with up to 20 results
- Download files individually or as ZIP
- Create directory & delete entry tools (auto-approved)
